{{Infobox concept
| name = Union Subline
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Union Subline]] is a platform for company announcements.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Union Subline]] has job listings for experienced mages.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Billions of people are connected to the [[Union Subline]] at once.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
